section.heading: Guarantee of residency for spouses of servicemembers

content.p: For the purposes of establishing the residency of a spouse of a servicemember for any purpose (including the registration of a business), the spouse of a servicemember may elect to use the same residence as the servicemember regardless of the date on which the marriage of the spouse and the servicemember occurred.

section.sourceCredit: (Oct. 17, 1940, ch. 888, title VII, § 707, as added Pub. L. 116–92, div. A, title XVII, § 1739(a), Dec. 20, 2019, 133 Stat. 1820; amended Pub. L. 117–81, div. A, title X, § 1081(c), Dec. 27, 2021, 135 Stat. 1922.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2021—Pub. L. 117–81 made technical amendment to directory language of Pub. L. 116–92, § 1739(a).

note.heading: Effective Date of of 2021 Amendment
note.p: Pub. L. 117–81, div. A, title X, § 1081(c), Dec. 27, 2021, 135 Stat. 1922, provided that the amendment made by section 1081(c) is effective Dec. 20, 2019.
